chapter_title.en: Some Qualities, practices and manners of the Master of the Age (a.s)

text: 483- محمد بن عبدالله بن جعفر الحميري، عن أبيه، عن محمد بن عيسى، عن محمد بن عطاء، عن سلام بن أبي عمرة قال: قال أبوجعفر عليه السلام: لصاحب هذا الامر بيت يقال له: بيت الحمد، فيه سراج يزهر منذ يوم ولد إلى أن يقوم بالسيف.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 483 - It is narrated from Muhammad bin Abdullah bin Ja’far Himyari, from his father from Muhammad bin Isa from Muhammad bin Ataa from Salam bin Abi Umrah that he said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s) said: “The man of this matter will have a house called Baitul Hamd (house of praise). It will have a lamp, which was lighted since the day of his birth and it will continue to burn until the day he will rise with the sword.”
